examples: Estelle kept a photograph of her mother in a silver frame on the kitchen mantelpiece.
Instead of troubling to answer him Peter flew around the room, taking the mantelpiece on the way.
He noticed that the clock on the mantelpiece said nine, meaning twenty - one.
I'll just mention that on the mantelpiece in her bedroom reside Boston Terrier tchotchkes of every pose and permutation.
My wife allowed me to keep it hung over the mantelpiece after I convinced her it was a Color Field painting.
